data.name: CELLING_MUST_SELECT_CTRL_ITEM
data.value: You need to select control item.

data.name: COA_SAVED
data.value: Chart Of Accounts Information saved successfully.

data.name: COA_SAVE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save Chart Of Accounts Information.

data.name: DUPLICATE_COA_ENTRY
data.value: Duplicate Chart of Accounts entry detected.

data.name: EMPTY_COA
data.value: Please enter Chart Of Accounts data.

data.name: INCOMPLETE_COA
data.value: Please select all items to complete the Chart of Accounts.

data.name: UNKNOWN_CELLING_COMBINATION
data.value: Chart Of Accounts information not found for this ceiling entry.

data.name: CELLING_EXCEEDED
data.value: Budget amount is exceeded ceiling amount.

data.name: APPLICATION_EXCEPTION
data.value: An error ocured during the process. error is being logged.

data.name: NO_OF_INPUT_MUST_ENTER
data.value: You need to enter no of input.

data.name: QUANTITY_OF_INPUT_MUST_ENTER
data.value: You need to enter quantity of input.

data.name: UOM_MUST_SELECT
data.value: You need to select unit of measure.

data.name: CONTROL_ITEM_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save control item information.

data.name: REPORTING_ITEM_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save reporting item information.

data.name: DETAIL_ITEM_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save detail item information.

data.name: INVALID_USER
data.value: User name or password not match.

data.name: SELECT_COMPANY
data.value: You need to select company name.

data.name: SELECT_COMPANY_OR_ACTIVITY_CENTER
data.value: You need to select company name or department name.

data.name: PRESS_EDIT_BUTTON
data.value: You need to press edit button.

data.name: ENTRY_CORRECT_FORMAT
data.value: You need to enter only numaric value.

data.name: ENTRY_TWO_DIGIT
data.value: You must need entry two digit.

data.name: CELLING_MUST_SELECT_DETAIL_ITEM
data.value: You need to select detail item.

data.name: CELLING_MUST_SELECT_REPORTING_ITEM
data.value: You need to select reporting item.

data.name: TaskType_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save task type information.

data.name: TaskType_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update task type information.

data.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE_SAVED
data.value: Unit of Measure information saved successfully.

data.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save unit of Measure information.

data.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE_UPDATE
data.value: Unit of Measure information update successfully.

data.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update unit of Measure information.

data.name: INFLATION_RATE_SAVED_FAILED
data.value: Failed to save inflation rate information.

data.name: INFLATION_RATE_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update inflation rate information.

data.name: SELECT_ACCOUNT_CATEGORY
data.value: Your need to select account type.

data.name: SELECT_FISCAL_YEAR
data.value: Your need to select fiscal year.

data.name: SELECT_CHECK_BOX
data.value: Please select check box to approve budget.

data.name: BASE_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_ACTIVITY
data.value: Base amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than activity level ceiling

data.name: BASE_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_RESPONSIBILITY
data.value: Base amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than responsibility level ceiling.

data.name: DEPARTMENT_BASE_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Base amount of department level ceiling is exceeding base amount of head level ceiling.

data.name: DEPARTMENT_ONCE_OF_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Once off amount of department level ceiling is exceeding base amount of head level ceiling.

data.name: DEPARTMENT_REVISED_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Revised amount of department level ceiling is exceeding base amount of head level ceiling.

data.name: HEAD_CELLINT_AMOUNT_INVALID
data.value: Head ceiling amount can't be less than activity ceiling amount.

data.name: ONCE_OF_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_ACTIVITY
data.value: Once off amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than activity level ceiling.

data.name: ONCE_OF_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_RESPONSIBILITY
data.value: Once off amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than responsibility level ceiling.

data.name: RESPONSIBILITY_BASE_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Base amount of responsibility level ceiling is exceeding base amount of activity level ceiling.

data.name: RESPONSIBILITY_ONCE_OF_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Once off amount of responsibility level ceiling is exceeding base amount of activity level ceiling.

data.name: RESPONSIBILITY_REVISED_CELLING_EXCEED
data.value: Revised amount of responsibility level ceiling is exceeding base amount of activity level ceiling.

data.name: REVISED_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_ACTIVITY
data.value: Revised amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than activity level ceiling.

data.name: REVISED_AMOUNT_LESS_THAN_RESPONSIBILITY
data.value: Revised amount of head level ceiling can’t be less than responsibility level ceiling.

data.name: ROLE_ADMIN_NOT_EDITABLE
data.value: Admin role can not be updated.

data.name: DELETE_MESSAGE
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: ACTIVITY_CENTER_ALRADY_EXIST_IN_BUDGE_OR_CELLING_INFORMATION
data.value: Department already exist in budget or ceiling information

data.name: RESP_CENTER_ALRADY_EXIST_IN_BUDGE_OR_CELLING_INFORMATION
data.value: Section already exist in budget or ceiling information

data.name: CONTROL_ITEM_ALRADY_EXIST_IN_BUDGE_OR_CELLING_INFORMATION
data.value: Control item already exist in budget or ceiling information.

data.value: Detail item already exist in budget or ceiling information.

data.name: REPORTING_ITEM_ALRADY_EXIST_IN_BUDGE_OR_CELLING_INFORMATION
data.value: Reporting item already exist in budget or ceiling information.

data.name: TASK_ALRADY_EXIST_IN_BUDGE_INFORMATION
data.value: Task already exist in budget information.

data.name: NO_DATA_FOUND
data.value: No data found for this combination .

data.name: APP_EXIT_CONFIRMATION
data.value: Do you want to exit now ?

data.name: YOU_ALREADY_HAVE_BASE_CURRENCY
data.value: You already have a base currency.

data.name: SELECT_CHECK_BOX_DISAPPROVED
data.value: Please select check box to disapprove budget.

data.name: RELEASE_AMOUNT_CANNOT_GRATER_THAN_REMAINING_AMOUNT
data.value: Release amount can't greater than remaining amount.

data.name: CANNOT_DELETE_ORDER_ITEM
data.value: Can not delete purchase ordered items, you only can modify quantity.

data.value: You need to select payment method.

data.value: You need to select PO number.

data.value: You need to select shipping agency.

data.value: You need to select shipping method.

data.value: You need to select invoice type.

data.name: SELECT_SUPPLIER
data.value: You need to select supplier name.

data.name: REMOVE_ALL_DATA_FROM_GRID
data.value: This change will remove all previously added data in grid. Dou you want to continue?

data.name: ENTER_VOUCHER_NUMBER
data.value: You need to enter voucher number.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_SELECT_VOUCHER_TYPE
data.value: You need to select voucher type.

data.name: SELECT_DUPLICATE_INVICE_NUMBER
data.value: You have already selected this invoice number !

data.name: NEED_TO_ENTER_PERIOD
data.value: You need to enter contract period.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_SELECT_REJECT_SEASON
data.value: You need to select reject reason.

data.name: YOU_CAN_EDIT_ONLY_REGISTERED_INVOICES
data.value: You can edit only registered invoice.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_ENTER_BATCH_NUMBER
data.value: You need to enter batch number.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_SELECt_BATCH_TYPE
data.value: You need to select batch type.

data.name: CANNOT_DELETE_CONTRACT_ITEM
data.value: Can't delete contract items. You can only change quantity and discount.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_ADD_CONTRACT_INFORMATION
data.value: You need to add contract information.

data.name: YOU_NEED_TO_ADD_INVOICE_INFORMATION
data.value: You need to add invoice information.

data.name: ONLY_CHECKED_VOUCHER_CAN_BE_APPROVED
data.value: Only checked voucher can be approved.

data.name: ONLY_ISSUED_VOUCHER_CAN_BE_CHECKED
data.value: Only issued voucher can be checked.

data.value: You need to select claim type.

data.value: You need to enter email address.

data.value: You need to enter phone number.

data.value: You need to select deposit type.

data.value: You need to enter deposited by.

data.value: You need to enter deposit reference no.

data.value: You need to enter short note.

data.value: Budget is not available to approved the voucher.

data.value: You need to select chart of account.

data.value: There is no chart of account for this

data.value: Batch has been failed to approved.

data.value: Fund is available to approve this order.

data.name: FUND_IS_NOT_AVAILABLE_TO_APPROVE_THIS_ORDER

data.value: You can edit only issued requisition.
